data.title: SMASHIFY LAUNCHES BETA PLATFORM TO REWRITE THE STREAMING EXPERIENCE FOR ARTIST AND FANS
data.description: A significant shift in music streaming is on the horizon as Smashify revealed its beta music platform on April 21, 2026, in Los Angeles. This innovative platform aims to revolutionize streaming services by fostering closer connections among artists, fans, and platform engagement. The launch signifies a move towards a more synchronized ecosystem in streaming music, potentially impacting the industry's dynamics.

data.title: Chicago Rivet & Machine Co. Announces Year-End Results of Operations
data.description: Warrenville, Illinois - On April 21, 2026, Chicago Rivet & Machine Co. (NYSE American: CVR) disclosed its audited financial outcomes for the year 2025. A breakdown of their consolidated operational results for 2024 and 2025 revealed changes in their net figures.

data.title: Interactive Brokers Earnings Meet Views Amid Higher Trading Activity. The Stock Is Falling
data.description: Interactive Brokers reported earnings in line with expectations, as trading activity remained robust. Despite this, IBKR stock declined later in the day and is on track to drop below a key buy threshold. The company's financial performance was in line with forecasts, reflecting elevated trading volumes. This news has led to a decrease in the stock price, signaling a potential buying opportunity for investors.

data.title: Why Robotics Giant Intuitive Surgical Dropped Despite Its Beat And Raise
data.description: In the first quarter, the leading robotic surgery company surpassed expectations and increased its guidance. Despite this, Intuitive Surgical experienced a drop in its stock value. The company's strong performance included exceeding analyst forecasts and raising its future outlook. This news was featured in an article on Investor's Business Daily.

data.title: Carvana Posts Amazing Profit Growth, Earns Rating Upgrade
data.description: Carvana's Relative Strength Rating has exceeded 80, indicating strong performance. The company has reported remarkable profit growth, leading to an upgrade in its rating. The news was shared through "Investor's Business Daily."

data.title: Enerflex Ltd. Announces Timing of First Quarter Financial and Operational Results and Schedules Virtual Investor Update
data.description: In Calgary, Alberta, on April 21, 2026, Enerflex Ltd. (TSX: EFX) (NYSE: EFXT) announced that it intends to reveal its financial outcomes and operational highlights for the first quarter of 2026, ending on March 31. The detailed report is scheduled to be disclosed to the public on Thursday, May 7, 2026, before the markets open. This information will be disseminated through a press release and will be accessible on Enerflex's official website (www.enerflex.com). It will also be accessible on the Company's electronic profiles on SEDAR+ and EDGAR at www.sedarplus.ca and www.sec.gov/edgar, respectively.
SOUTH32 Q1: THE MIDDLE EAST CONFLICT HAS DRIVEN HIGHER GLOBAL FREIGHT RATES AND RAW MATERIAL COSTS. SIERRA GORDA FY26 UNIT COSTS EXPECTED 5-10% ABOVE CURRENT GUIDANCE.

SOUTH32 Q1: ON TRACK TO COMPLETE ASSESSMENT OF HERMOSA'S TAYLOR ZINC-LEAD-SILVER PROJECT MILESTONES AND CAPEX DURING THE JUNE HALF-YEAR. PLANS TO DRAW DOWN INVENTORY AT MOZAL ALUMINIUM AND CANNINGTON IN Q2. NO DIESEL SHORTAGES CURRENTLY BUT CLOSELY MONITORING THE MIDDLE EAST SITUATION.
SOUTH32 Q1: AUSTRALIA MANGANESE PRODUCTION AT 589 KWMT WITH FY26 TARGET OF 3,000 KWMT; SOUTH AFRICA MANGANESE AT 500 KWMT; WORSLEY ALUMINA AT 886 KT.

data.title: Shoals Technologies Group, Inc. Announces Participation in Upcoming Events for the Investor Community
data.description: Shoals Technologies Group, Inc. recently shared its plans to participate in upcoming events geared towards engaging with the investor community. The company is set to engage in various investor-focused activities, demonstrating their commitment to engaging with stakeholders. Shoals Technologies Group, Inc. aims to use these events as an opportunity to showcase its operations and strategies. This move signals the company's focus on proactive investor relations and its dedication to transparency. Through these engagements, the company seeks to strengthen its relationships with investors, potentially leading to enhanced market visibility and support. These upcoming events mark a significant step for Shoals Technologies Group, Inc. in fostering strong connections within the investor community.

data.title: Aeroméxico Reports Unaudited First Quarter                         2026 Results
data.description: On April 21, 2026, Grupo Aeroméxico S.A.B. de C.V. (NYSE: AERO & BMV: AERO) announced their unaudited consolidated financial results for the first quarter of 2026. The results cover the period ending March 31, 2026. The company utilized the U.S. dollar as its functional currency and presentation currency for the financial statements. All figures are in millions of U.S. dollars unless stated otherwise. Please note that these figures represent preliminary information available as of the date of the earnings release and are not a complete representation of the company's financial performance during the period indicated.

data.title: Rockefeller Foundation Accelerates U.S. Economic Solutions at "Big Bets for America: Baltimore"
data.description: Over 250 prominent figures in the United States spanning philanthropy, policy, private enterprises, and non-profit sectors convened to address and amplify innovative strategies for the nation's critical economic issues. The Rockefeller Foundation organized the event titled Big Bets for America, held in Baltimore on April 21, 2026.

data.title: Nuvation Bio Announces IBTROZI® (Taletrectinib) Showed Highly Durable Responses in Longer-Term Follow-up Data from Pivotal Studies Presented at AACR 2026
data.description: Long-term analysis of combined data from TRUST-I and TRUST-II indicated a median response duration of almost 50 months and a median progression-free survival of 46.1 months in patients who had not received TKI treatment before. IBTROZI also showed a substantial overall response rate of 89.8% in TKI-naïve patients.

data.title: Emerita Comments on Press Release Issued by Denarius Metals
data.description: On April 21, 2026, Emerita Resources Corp. learned of a press release from Denarius Metals Corp. announcing intentions to increase their offer to acquire all outstanding common shares of Emerita. Denarius had initially made an offer detailed in Emerita's April 13, 2026 press release. Despite this, Emerita has not yet received a formal written proposal reflecting the increased offer from Denarius. Emerita is listed on the TSXV under the ticker symbol EMO, on the OTCQX as EMOTF, and on the FSE as LLJA.

data.title: PowerTransitions to Enter New York Market with Acquisition of 323 MW of Operating Power Generation Assets
data.description: In Houston, PowerTransitions®, a prominent independent power producer focused on redeveloping older power and industrial facilities, has revealed the acquisition of a collection of five power plants amounting to 323 MW capacity. This agreement includes associated pipeline infrastructure and is made with affiliates of Alliance Energy Group. The portfolio obtained from Alliance consists of the following five plants: Batavia, Hillburn, Massena, Shoemaker, and Sterling, which cumulatively generate 323 MW.

data.title: Synergen Rx Launches New Website to Elevate Specialty Pharmacy Experience for Patients, Providers, and Manufacturers
data.description: Synergen Rx has introduced an upgraded digital platform showcasing its nationwide capabilities, high-touch care approach, and dedication to innovation in specialty pharmacy. The initiative was announced on April 21, 2026, in Atlanta. This national specialty pharmacy specializes in providing personalized care for intricate and uncommon health conditions.
